programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso: Catalina se cotiza
programme.desc: El Gato Gordo hace una fiesta de bienvenida para Catalina, canta y baila con ella. Le ofrece casa, viajes y joya sin embargo, antes de ir a la cama pide el doble de lo acordado inicialmente.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Marcela hace un trío, mientras Isabel cree tener todo bajo control. Ante la presión de Escobar, Nacho emprende una misión peligrosa: sacar a Mejía del hospital.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Es el cumpleaños de Sonny. La Madrina invita a Isabel a la celebración, si bien ella no sabe cuál es el plan que le tienen preparado. Isabel sirve de carnada.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Tras el secuestro de Sonny, la Madrina ordena castigar a Judy para que confiese a dónde lo llevaron. Nacho llega a Medellín y Escobar exige que lo vea. Tienen un retrato hablado de Griselda.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: El club nocturno más grande y exquisito de Miami abre sus puertas y la felicidad es tanta que Isabel y Nacho van a la cama para celebrarlo. La Madrina y Jorge Ochoa son invitados especiales.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Nacho e Isabel destellan estilo y glamur, pero la cocaína es el imán en La Juerga para atraer a narcos poderosos, a policías corruptos, a los que no lo son y hasta infiltrados de la federal.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Los policías corruptos quieren demostrar su lealtad a Nacho para entrar al negocio de la droga, así que siguen su orden de atacar a la Madrina. Se desata el escándalo entre Nacho e Isabel.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Isabel, sola y deprimida, invita a su ex, Kyle, a La Juerga. Cuando Nacho los ve bailar juntos se vuelve loco y saca un arma. Un soplón informa a la Madrina dónde está su hijo.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora se debate entre la vida y la muerte, en medio de los ruegos de Lorenzo. Martín tiene remordimientos, sus juegos sensuales lo condenan. Natalia le hace una escena de celos a Lorenzo.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín y Aurora entran en un triángulo amoroso sin fin. Ahora padres e hijos pelean por el amor. El enfrentamiento se da con mucha rabia por parte de Lorenzo y Blanca, que pelea con Aurora.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Junior lleva a Rosa a cenar en casa y recibe una propuesta sobre el futuro de Venus. Bárbara le reclama a José Ignacio su interés en Eva. El proyecto confidencial de Venus despierta interés.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: La nueva colección de Venus se filtra. José Ignacio saca conclusiones desacertadas. Bárbara busca información sobre el papá de Eduardito. El pasado de Gabriel es útil y José Ignacio lo sabe.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Mientras todos van tras la colección Diamante Rosa, Rosaura confronta a Raquel sobre su pasado. Gabriel y Rodolfo intercambian sospechas. Por poco, Rosa esquiva otra visita peligrosa.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosaura lidia con el pasado y busca información de Eva, pero la que obtiene le golpea la vista. Rosa acepta aparentemente la tregua que le ofrece José Ignacio, siente un poco de confusión.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: La rivalidad entre Rosa y José Ignacio se tambalea, y nuevos sentimientos afloran con fuerza. Margaret, la directora del internado, acecha a Eduardito. Andrea le debe una explicación a Eva.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Ramón logra que lo dejen ver a Eva. La visita es fructífera y el mundo de Rosa está por derrumbarse aunque descubre quién es el traidor en Venus y toma una decisión radical en otra dirección.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Noticias sobre Eduardito precipitan la decisión de Rosa. Rodolfo ve una oportunidad, José Ignacio también. Rosaura está segura, solo una persona puede ser la dueña del diamante rosa.

programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Más Secretos: Kerim va a donde los Yasaran. Munir y Resat son llevados a la policía y se dan cuenta de quién los entregó. Selim y Erdogan están muy nerviosos. Asude le cuenta a Sami otro de sus secretos.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Pareja Normal: Hacer Ovacik enfrenta a Mustafá acerca de sus sentimientos por Fatmagül. Ebe Nine y Kadir se preparan para su boda. Fatmagül y Kerim salen a disfrutar de Estambul como una pareja normal.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - San Valentín: Kerim le da a Fatmagül su regalo de San Valentín. Eve Nine y Kadir disfrutan de su luna de miel. Asude va al restaurante "La Rosa" a hablar con Fatmagül.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Testigo: Ebe Nine y Kedir vuelven a casa. Los Yasaran ayudan a Mustafá. Fahrettin se encuentra con un hombre que podría ayudar en el caso de Fatmagül. Munir se encuentra con Asude.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Terapia: Meltem va a "La Rosa" y les cuenta lo que sabe. Fatmagül decide empezar a hacer su vestido de novia. Mustafá escapa de la custodia de los Yasaran. Kerim y Fatmagül van a terapia.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Desesperación: Kadir y todos van a la policía para intentar encontrar a Fatmagül lo antes posible. Kerim va a hablar con Hacer Ovacik para intentar saber a dónde fue Mustafá. Mukaddes vuelve a hablar de más.

programme.title: ¿Dónde Está El Gober?
programme.desc: Sátira política que explora el mundo de el espía más secreto de todo México. Solo él puede salvarlos del mayor de los males.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Blog: La Dra. Nil hace un blog y comienza a ganar fama. Fahrettin y Kerim salen heridos pero todos logran volver a casa. Mustafá escapa de nuevo. Selim y Erdogan planean irse del país.

programme.title: Juro que te amo

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: La policía detiene a Justino y es llevado a la cárcel. Malena confronta a Justino acerca de los abusos que ha cometido. El plan de Max se pone en marcha e intenta matar a José María con una intoxicación de gas. Rogelio es acusado de fraude.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Rogelio escucha a Cristina hablando con Renato. Pantaleón encuentra el cuerpo del padre Basilio y sospecha que Justino fue quien lo mató. Antonia testifica en contra de Justino y lo acusa de haber abusado de ella.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Pantaleón chantajea a Justino con decir que él sabe que mató al padre Basilio. Leonora intenta ahorcar a Fausta. Malena y Mariela se dan cuenta de que Max les ha robado. Mariano le dice a Antonia que sabe que lo ama y la besa.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Miguel le pide a Daniela que se case con él. Ana Paula le pide a Gustavo que huya del pueblo para evitar que lo mate. Gustavo enfrenta a Rogelio para confesarle el amor que siempre le ha tenido a Ana Paula.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rogelio le prohíbe a Gustavo alejar a Ana Paula de su lado. Efraín saca a Gustavo de la hacienda para evitar que le haga daño a Rogelio. Rogelio les pide a sus empleados que vigilen a Ana Paula para evitar que se escape de la hacienda.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Malos tratos
programme.desc: Ana Paula se pone mal y es llevada de emergencia al hospital. Vanesa siente celos al saber que Esteban está interesado en otra mujer. Esteban sospecha que Vanesa es la culpable de dejar la hacienda de Rogelio sin agua.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Consejos
programme.desc: Bruno, Elena y Jorge idean un plan para acusar a Alex de secuestro. Chucho le aconseja a Pedro rescate a María José de Elena.

programme.title: La desalmada: Anillo de compromiso

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Un encuentro inesperado

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Cena arruinada

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Difícil decisión

programme.title: La usurpadora: El juicio

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos: Un bailecito

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Martina quedó deprimida porque su amado "Muffin Love" la dejó plantada en el hogar, pero la familia la ayuda a superar la tristeza. La Nena se aburre porque Martina no tiene ganas de pelea.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido está muy nervioso porque Martina piensa que va a dar a luz a un par de gemelos. Renata, Licha, Nena y Gaby tratan de introducir a Martina en el complejo mundo de la maternidad.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Gaby consigue trabajo como guía de turismo, y los López hacen de su casa un museo para ganar dinero. La vida de una típica familia mexicana promedio. Plácido recupera su taxi que estaba en el corralón.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María cree que está embarazada y Albertano tiene problemas para aceptar que va a ser papá. El Macaco organiza una protesta en contra de la comercialización indebida del tamal.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Detienen a Doña Lucha al creer que es la jefa de una banda de marchistas, para sacarla de la cárcel, sus hijos juntan sus ahorros con los que comprarían su regalo del 10 de mayo. En la cárcel los policías creen que ella mató a un delincuente.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico le pide a don Camerino que sea el padrino de Bibi para que pague su fiesta de 15 años, el le da dinero. Ludovico y Federica se gastan el dinero en otras cosas y tienen que improvisar la fiesta.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica inscriben a Junior en el concurso Niños de Oro, donde participa cantando ópera, pues desean ganar el gran premio.

programme.title: 40 y 20

programme.title: Million Dollar House Hunters

programme.title: Million Dollar House Hunters
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cynthia and Doug seek to move from their modern home to a more traditional one. They're touring three luxury properties around Los Angeles, prioritizing a big kitchen and a tennis court.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Lisa and Joe decided to have an existing wooden retaining wall in their backyard rebuilt using concrete blocks. As the new block wall went up, Joe and Lisa began to question some glaring items - the lack of gravel base and the Geo-grid reinforcement material lay unused even though most of the wall was up. The project dragged on and the wall simply wasn't getting finished. Finally, the contractor stopped coming altogether and would not answer his cell phone. Lisa actually phoned the local hospitals to check if he had been admitted. They couldn't believe he would just disappear without finishing the job and leaving behind his tools. The homeowners had paid the contractor for all the materials, and when they received a bill in the mail a month later from the material supplier for the remaining 50% balance, they realized they had been taken for a ride. Mike and his team of landscape professions tear down the wall and build a retaining wall that is rock solid.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Julie and Joe needed another bedroom in anticipation of adopting a second child. The high-pitched roof on their new suburban home seemed to have a large enough attic space to accommodate an extra room. Their contractor advised them that it was an easy retrofit because exterior walls and roof are not touched. The reality is quite different. In order to utilize the volume inside the attic, the contractor removed the crucial structure that supported the roof, and created a dangerous mess. Mike and the team have no choice but to tear the roof completely off and build the attic space properly.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Rebecca and Thomas had several contractors bid on their renovation project, and when all of them came in with quotes that were lower than what they had initially expected, they thought they'd found a deal. Pipes burst in the ceiling of the basement, flooding down the walls and leaking through the new pot lights. Then they discovered electrical outlets in other parts of the home were sparking while others were not working. In this episode, Mike explores the true cost of a basement renovation, and the pitfalls of competitive "underbidding" by contractors.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Brace yourself for an exterior brick fix that becomes an interior intervention.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This story highlights the work of a modern day ''Snake Oil Salesman''- a contractor that doesn't fit the stereotypical con-artist profile. His slick computer assisted sales pitch and impressive portfolio eventually gave way to sloppy workmanship and incompetent engineering. The basement facade put up by this contractor finally came crashing down when the newly installed ceiling collapsed, prompting the homeowners to place a distress call to Mike Holmes.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Duck is a favorite in restaurants, but often considered too difficult to cook at home. No longer! Julia prepares her original (first shown on The French Chef) pan roasted duck, glazed with shallots and parsnips. And Jacques roasts a whole duck, then combines slices of the juicy duck breast with garlic, mustard and delicate salad greens tossed in garlic, mustard and duck giblets.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Duck is a favorite in restaurants, but often considered too difficult to cook at home. No longer! programme.title: Julia Child's Kitchen Wisdom
programme.desc: Julia Child's Kitchen Wisdom is a heartfelt tribute to Julia Child's culinary legacy, showcasing her favorite recipes and techniques from 1963 to 1999 through personal anecdotes, commentary from colleagues and fans, and classic television clips, providing spirited entertainment for her enduring audience.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: “There's nothing as good as a good piece of meat”, and as Julia is quick to point out, there is less and less really good (well marbled and aged) beef to be found. Hangar Steak, Skirt Strip, Flank and Ribeye.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques and Julia create some very special desserts in this colorful episode. Poires Belle Helene - poached pear perched atop pound cake drizzled with chocolate sauce sweet creamy rich and delicious Strawberries Sabayon and Crepes Suzette, classically flambéed and served with orange butter and powdered sugar, as well as a Hungarian inspired torta of layered crepes baked with raspberry jam.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques dressed in a toga? For the Julia's Caesar Salad, of course! This show has a salad for everyone, from a simple mixed green salad with a garlic vinaigrette, to classic Caesar and Nicoise (with fresh seared tuna) Salads. How about some Potato Salad? Well, Julia and Jacques prepare two: an American style potato salad with home made mayonnaise, and its tart French cousin.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: As a child, one of Julia's favorite sandwiches was an ice cream sandwich. Jacques was a stick of chocolate between two pieces of bread. Today, Julia's favorite is the Croque Monsieur, or pressed and baked ham & cheese. Of course, Jacques provides a variation he calls a Croque Madam. A close second they can both agree on is the New England lobster roll, served on a toasted hot dog bun.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques prepare artichokes—several ways—including artichoke hearts stuffed with spinach and mushroom Duxelle. Julia demonstrates her secret to ever-green cooked string beans and butter bruised peas. Jacques counters with his aromatic Tomato Provencal.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Sounds rather ordinary for this celebrated duet…but here, Jacques and Julia demonstrate why Beef Burgundy and Pot Roast have beens favorite “classic” recipes (here and in France) for what seems like “forever,” and they put their own signature on it “Swiss cheese mashed potatoes” (for the Beef Burgundy), and “soft ribbon noodles” (fort the Pot Roast).

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Sole food and more. One of Julia's most memorable meals was the Sole Meuniere she had on first arriving in Paris after WWII. With Jacques, she recreates this dish, as delightful as ever. The sole is followed by grilled halibut with herbed butter, and poached snapper with beautifully turned and sautéed cucumbers.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E01
programme.desc: In this episode, we head straight into the heart of New Zealand! Then we step through Hell's Gate and experience the country's most unique geothermal occurrence. Eager to catch our breath, we lose it walking amongst the breathing majestic giants at Redwood Tree Walk. And finally, arrive in Hobbiton. Yes, that Hobbiton of lore!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E02
programme.desc: In this episode, we seek refuge in Waiheke, New Zealand. Unsurprisingly, our appetite for ingesting the best of this region leads us to the nutrient-rich, Te Matuku Marine Reserve- where we learn the value of a keystone species of the ecosystem... OYSTERS! Bellyful and bound to take a dip, we meander to Waiheke Island Resor

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E03

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E04

programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Vampires and Drunks
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan. Too bad the owner is throwing a party with his neck-biting, vampire-wannabe friends. And finally, Matt and Froy face the fury of a clan of drunken relatives when they interrupt a raucous family reunion.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Incompetent and Unfaithful
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league championship softball team. And finally, Froy and Sonia stumble into a bizarre love triangle when it turns out their car is owned by the sugar-daddy of a cheating spouse.

programme.title: Don't Cry, Bro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Don't Spray Me with That
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.title: A Zamboni?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing. And finally, Lou & Matt hit the ice and a bunch of irate hockey players in an effort to repossess a Zamboni

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: The Outpost Lodge, Northern Kruger National Park, Limpopo Province
programme.desc: Sika's Safari Adventure starts in the Northern Kruger National Park in the Limpopo Province, where THE OUTPOST Lodge rests high on a hill encompassed by stunning vistas of the Luvuvhu River set in the Makuleke Region that falls in the epicentre of the Great Limpopo Park, which comprises Kruger National Park, the Gaza National Park in Mozambique and the Gonarezhou National Park in Zimbabwe. Designed by an Italian born architect, Enrico Daffonchio using simple, clean lines and combining elements of steel and canvas, the stunning contemporary design of this Luxury Kruger Park Lodge emphasizes its beautiful surrounds but blends in with the Wilderness that is it's home.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Jamala Madikwe, Madikwe Game Reserve, North West Province
programme.desc: JAMALA MADIKWE, Sika's second Safari destination has been awarded “Most Romantic Lodge in South Africa” and is set around a Game-rich waterhole in the malaria-free Madikwe Game Reserve of the North West Province along the border of Botswana. Once an area consisting mainly of Cattle farms before it was transformed into a Wildlife Reserve in the early 90's. Today, the Reserve supports a thriving and incredible diversity of Species due to the fact that it lies in an ecological transition zone between the Kalahari and Lowveld Wilderness.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Gaoligongshan Park: China - Himalaya's Gold
programme.desc: In western China, along the border to Tibet is the Baima Snow Mountain reserve. Both humans and animals have to be persistant, willpowered and strong to be able to survive in over 3000 metres height. The Baima snow mountain reserve is one of the most mysterious and impenetrable regions of the world, full of breathtaking beauty and contrasts.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Gir National Park: India - Asia's Last Lion
programme.desc: In the west of India live wildcats which you wouldn't expect in India: lions. They live and roam freely in a surrounding where natives live as well. The Maldhari are proud to live in a region together with the lions, although they kill their cattle now and then. The north of Gujarat is mostly a desert where seminomads live. The Fakirani Jat breed a very special camel race: Karai-Camels which are able to swim. The camels swim daily around 3 kilometres to mangrove islands to feed.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Kinabatangan River: Borneo - Forgotten Paradise
programme.desc: The Kinabatangan winds for over 560 kilometres across the north of Borneo. Nowhere else in Sabah live as many wild and rare animals as along the river: Orang-Utans, Elephants, crocodiles and proboscis monkeys. But the biodiversity is endangered because more and more palm oil plantations replace the rainforest. The natives fight for the preservation of the forest and the unique wildlife.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Pu Mat National Park: Vietnam - Of Bears and Men
programme.desc: The jungle in the north of Vietnam is nearly impenetrable and there are parts where no human has ever set foot on before. The rainforest oft he Pu Mat Nationalpark is a retreat for threatened animals like the Asian black bear, pangonlins or rare species of monkeys. Tuan, a biologist and specialist for bears, explores the untouched regions of the nationalpark to find the black bear. The animals which are hunted the most are Pangolins. It is believed that their scale has healing power and their meat is considered a delicacy. A small vietnamese animal protection organisation fights for the suvival of this species.

programme.title: Animal Odyssey
programme.desc: Africa deserves to be called a true "paradise of biodiversity." But if we had to pick one, iconic African animal, it would be the Elephant. Even if this animal started its journey in Africa, its ancestors have dominated the world and the five continents through an exceptional evolution in the animal kingdom!

programme.desc: Let Me In is a haunting and provocative thriller written and directed by Matt Reeves (CLOVERFIELD), based on the best-selling Swedish novel "Let The Right One In" and highly acclaimed film of the same name. Chloë Grace Moretz (DARK SHADOWS, HUGO, KICK-ASS) stars as Abby, a mysterious 12-year-old who moves in with a man who appears to be her father (Oscar®- nominee Richard Jenkins of THE VISITOR, CABIN IN THE WOODS), next door to Owen (Kodi Smit-McPhee of PARANORMAN, THE ROAD), a social outcast who is viciously bullied at school. In his loneliness, Owen forms a profound bond with his new neighbor Abby, but can't help noticing that she is like no one he has ever met before. As a string of grisly murders grips his wintry New Mexico town, Owen has to confront the reality that this seemingly innocent girl may not be what she seems.

programme.title: Benang Kelambu & Stokel: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experience a breathtaking waterfall flowing down a forest wall, surrounded by overgrown vines.

programme.title: Kapas Biru Waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Escape to Indonesia with tropical vegetation and a spectacular rushing waterfall.

programme.title: Above & Below the Caribbean
programme.desc: Relax as you float above and below the surface of a beautiful underwater kelp forest in the Caribbean, with this stunning 1 hour static scene featuring swimming fish, passing clouds, and sunshine glistening. Filmed by Tilo & Yvonne Kühnast.

programme.title: A Day in Big Sur 2
programme.desc: Transport your senses to the rugged yet exquisitely beautiful Big Sur coast of California to relax & absorb the healing sights and sounds of McWay Falls from a unique and rare perspective. Filmed more than a decade ago and remastered for maximum color and quality, "A Day in Big Sur" showcases the timeless beauty of this magical destination and attempts to truly capture the spirit of this natural paradise through the use of 50+ artistically framed video perspectives - all featuring real stereo nature sounds for an immersive relaxation experience.

programme.title: Hawaii Beaches: Oahu 1
programme.desc: Escape to the sandy solitudes of Hawaii's tropical beaches for 2 hours in 4K UHD with this ambient nature film featuring just the stereo nature sounds.

programme.title: Pass Island: Phillipines
programme.desc: Invite paradise home with white sandy beaches and crystal-clear waters.

programme.title: Healing Hawaii: Kauai
programme.desc: Prepare your senses for the ultimate visual & audio journey around the exotic island paradise of Kauai, known as the Garden Isle. Immerse yourself in 60 different one-minute scenes of pure nature bliss, slowly transitioning from one to the next.

programme.title: Wanderlust: Places I've Never Been
programme.desc: Places I've Never Been S5E1 — Dreamy travel photography, cityscapes, & faraway places.

programme.title: Autumn Harvest
programme.desc: Autumn Harvest E1 — A captivating art collection that embraces the colors of fall and the cozy ambiance of pumpkin spice. This assortment of artworks celebrates the rich palette of warm hues, including burnt oranges, golden yellows, deep reds, and earthy browns.

programme.title: Halloween Party: Haunted Fiesta
programme.desc: Halloween Party S1E2: Haunted Fiesta — Showcasing intricate sugar skulls and motifs from Mexico, this vibrant collection is a visual tribute to those who have passed. Guitars, horns, and violins paint vivid melodies while sparse earthy shakers and maracas add a layer of dreamy percussion.

programme.title: Pink Warriors II
programme.desc: Pink Warriors S1E2 — Symbolizing hope and solidarity, the artworks serve as a beacon of hope, encouraging viewers to stand together in unity. Uplifting melodies guide us through pop, funk, and disco-infused soft house.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now III
programme.desc: Hispanic Artists Now E3 — This art collection of real & imagined landscapes, soulful abstract work, & vivid surrealist portraits offers a colorful exploration Hispanic culture. The music includes rhythmic electro, percussive afro-beats, & soft-house with a modern Latin edge.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now I
programme.desc: Hispanic Artists Now E1 — A colorful journey through time and culture, showcasing the diverse talents of artists with Latin American roots. The artwork is accompanied by mid-tempo tunes with influences that stretch across Reggaeton, Flamenco, Baille, Salsa, and Latin Jazz.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Marc Scheff + Mischelle Moy
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E2: Mark Scheff + Mischelle Moy — A fusion of the diverse artistic visions of our featured artists. Marc Scheff captures emotions through expressive portraits that speak to the soul while Mischelle Moy embraces the beauty of nature through vibrant colors and mesmerizing landscapes.
